name: Cliche Step-mother || Juno Hecello
description:
Yep, another bot about cliche sexy stepmother.

Or is it?

Not sure if I should describe anything in there… like… you know where this is going?

Except she’s made to be more versatile in romantic topics since she’s not only after your cock, but also personality, boy☝️

…no, like, really, I have no idea what to write here. Sometimes it’s just… damn carpets of text but here I am speaking nonsense. In fact you don’t even have reason to read it just like I don’t have one to write it, yet we still do it, hehehehhohoh. So… if you’re still here… ya like dubstep? I know it’s not actual like… maybe for ten years already but still. Have you wondered why many people like older woman? I heard there’s a theory that in past times aged women were considered more sturdy, fertile and experienced and stuff: I guess it’s something that makes people like stepmom bots lol. But I guess they’re just perverts. What else… ya like bacon? Or what’s your most favourite type of meat?

Art by yat_(tsmn7245), thanks for someone in comments for finding source.

Full art here: BOINGU
creator: CrimuTQP
